3328120.name: Paleobiome
3328120.description:
Paleobiome is a 3D paleo-simulation experience where you explore and interact with Earth’s ancient ecosystems across deep time. Built on real scientific data, the game reconstructs extinct landscapes, climates, plants, and animals, allowing players to witness how life once evolved, thrived, and vanished.

There is no single protagonist—the world itself is the main character. As you travel through eras, you’ll unlock new biomes, observe species as they adapt to shifting environments, and discover how climate, geology, and evolution shaped the planet. Each biome offers unique goals and challenges: study predator–prey dynamics, track vegetation changes through climate cycles, experiment with environmental variables, or simply explore and learn at your own pace.

Gameplay centers around exploration, observation, and discovery. You can zoom into micro-details of plant structures, follow prehistoric animals as they interact or compete, and use simulation tools to influence conditions and watch ecosystems respond in real time. Every environment is richly layered with dynamic weather, ambient soundscapes, and scientifically informed behavior systems.

Whether you’re looking for an educational experience, a relaxed exploration game, or a complex ecosystem simulator, Paleobiome offers a unique window into Earth’s past—one where the story is written by nature itself.

Key Features:

  • Eras as Progression: Unlock new periods and biomes as you explore and complete research objectives.

  • Authentic Prehistoric Life: Plants and animals modeled from fossil evidence, with behavior grounded in scientific research.

  • Dynamic Ecosystem Simulation: Climate, geology, and species interactions evolve over time based on your actions and natural processes.

  • Exploration-Driven Gameplay: Discover hidden species, rare environmental events, and ancient ecological patterns.

  • Immersive Presentation: High-fidelity 3D visuals, environmental audio, and atmospheric effects bring ancient worlds to life.

  • Educational and Relaxed Modes: Play as a researcher, a passive observer, or a hands-on experimenter adjusting conditions to test outcomes.
3328120.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
